title: Binary political referendum-style decision over 5 polling rounds

events.description: Prime Minister Alexis Tsipras announces a surprise referendum on bailout terms
NEUTRAL_1 government announces PRO_LEADER_1 holidays and capital controls
COUNTRY misses IMF debt repayment deadline, officially defaulting

agents.name: AGAINST_LEADER_1
agents.description: Governing AGAINST_LEADER_1 advocating for a 'No' vote to strengthen bargaining position

agents.name: PRO_LEADER_2
agents.description: Main opposition AGAINST_LEADER_1 advocating for a 'Yes' vote to keep COUNTRY in the Eurozone

agents.name: PRO_LEADER_1
agents.description: Restricted liquidity to NEUTRAL_1 banks, pressuring the 'Yes' outcome

agents.name: PRO_LEADER_3
agents.description: Demographic concerned with financial stability and Eurozone membership

agents.name: AGAINST_LEADER_2
agents.description: Demographic heavily impacted by austerity measures

agents.name: NEUTRAL_1

notes: Blinded: entity names, geography, and absolute dates redacted. Numeric fields preserved.
